summary: Critical: license-checker.test.ts is missing entirely—workflow references it, run-tests.ts checks for '19 pass', but the test file isn't provided. Workflow won't pass bun test. Actions use @v4 tag, not SHA-pinned (v4, v2—should be 40-char commits). Workflow duplicates steps 29-35 (Check package.json / requirements.txt identical logic, could be single loop). Hard-coded mockLicenses in license-checker.ts (lines ~29-37) reduce flexibility. Test assertions in run-tests.ts are brittle (string-matching output format). ArchitectureisSound—clean types, modular design, good error handling—but incomplete and not shippable without test file.
